plain:
I'm out here scrolling and scrolling
Scroll slow homie…
Tryna pharm dopamine
Feel me?
But in truth and reality…
I'm antisocial 'cause I'm always on social
and I wanna feel social
but I'm never really social
Watching everybody glow up
and I just wanna glow too
to places I wanna go to
I guess I really know you
because it's what I used to go through
Only way to beat it is to own it
follow me to where the dough is
I can help you get more conversions
Life is a blur when you start to get motion
to get you back focused
gon shine like a constellation
your hobby into an occupation
Stop the procrastination
you gon make the content: make it
This could be your confirmation
You could love it, you could leave it
as long as you believe it
